title: Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple
tagline: Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thirumoozhikulam Sree Lakshmanaperumal Temple is located in Thirumoozhikalam (Moozhikkulam) in Ernakulam district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Thirumoozhikulam Sree Lakshmanaperumal Temple is located in Thirumoozhikalam (Moozhikkulam) in Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. The temple finds mention in some of verses of ancient Tamil Vedam (Nalayira Divya Prabhandham) sung by the Sri Vaishnava Alvars, particularly Nammalvar and Tirumangai Alvar and classified as Divya Desams, the 108 holy temples revered in the canon. This belongs to one of the 13 Malai Naatu (Kerala/Chera) Divya Desams, the Divya Desams located in Kerala. The temple is associated with the legend of Ramayana where Rama's brother Lakshmana worshipped Rama along with th

topPlaces.name: Moozhikkulam
topPlaces.description: Moozhikkulam is a village in Aluva taluk in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. This village is situated at the banks of Chalakkudy river, 7km from Athani and 12km from Cochin International Airport.

topPlaces.name: Poovathussery
topPlaces.description: Poovathussery is a village in the border between Ernakulam district and Thrissur district of Kerala, India. It is situated on the banks of Chalakudy River and has several paddy lands and coconut trees.

topPlaces.name: KochuKadavu
topPlaces.description: Kochukadavu is a village in southern part of Thrissur district. Which is situated in Kuzhoor Grama Panjayath,Kochukadavu is a small village located near the Chalakudy River in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Sree Vasudevapuram Mahavishnu Temple
topPlaces.description: Sree Vasudevapuram Mahavishnu Temple is an Indian temple located about 9 Kilometers westward of Cochin International Airport in Kunnukara panchayath in the suburbs of aluva (District Ernakulam) in the state of Kerala. It is believed to be consecrated by Maharshi Parashuraman.

topPlaces.name: Eravathur
topPlaces.description: Eravathur is a small village situated towards the south end of Thrissur district of Kerala state in India. This village is situated nearly 40 km (25 mi) away from Ernakulam city and nearly 45 km (28 mi) from Thrissur city.

topPlaces.name: Erayamkudy
topPlaces.description: Erayamkudy is a small village in the Thrissur District of the Kerala state of India. This village is on the shore of the Chalakudy River with an ancient temple, Erayamkudy Bhagavathi Temple.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkal Mahadeva temple
topPlaces.description: Chirakkal Mahadeva temple in Kerala, India is the 108th Shiva temple in India. The main deity in this temple is Lord Shiva and He is in Rowdra bhavam in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Parakkadavu
topPlaces.description: Parakkadavu (English: The ferry of rock) is a village situated along the banks of the Chalakkudi river in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Local paddy fields are fed by the Chalakkudi river.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirumoozhikkulam Lakshmana Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Moozhikkulam, Poovathussery, KochuKadavu, Sree Vasudevapuram Mahavishnu Temple, Eravathur.
